import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v == 32 or v == 9 or v == 10 or v == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn is_digit_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v >= 48 and v <= 57
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws_at(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        if v == 45
          sign = -1
          i = i + 1
        else if v == 43
          i = i + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      mut num = 0
      while i < n and is_digit_at(s, i)
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(v)
          num = num * 10 + (v - 48)
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
      result = list.push(result, num * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let m = remaining.len()
    mut max_val = 0
    mut max_idx = 0
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    while i < m
      match remaining.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if first
          max_val = v
          max_idx = i
          first = false
        else if v > max_val
          max_val = v
          max_idx = i
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    result = list.push(result, max_val)
    mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    while j < m
      if j != max_idx
        match remaining.get(j)
        when Some(v)
          new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_rem
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let k_trim = string.trim(line2)
  let k = match string.parse_int(k_trim)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
  let total = sorted.len()
  let take = if k < total
    k
  else
    total
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < take
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
